description_long: This object consists of two partially melted, off-white candles with visible wax drips and purple flames, set atop a small, round wooden platform. The candles are irregularly shaped, with one taller and one shorter, both showing signs of use and melted wax pooling at their bases. The wooden platform is supported by a decorative, dark metallic or bronze pedestal with a wide, stable base that features subtle dents and a slightly uneven surface. The pedestal has ornamental rings and a central column that tapers upward to the platform. The overall design suggests a vintage or antique style, suitable for atmospheric urban settings such as outdoor cafes, park tables, or historical street corners. The combination of materials and the presence of melted wax give the object a well-used, authentic appearance.
description: A pair of melted, off-white candles with purple flames sit on a round wooden platform, supported by a decorative dark metal pedestal. The object has a vintage, atmospheric look with visible wax drips and a sturdy base.
description_view_0: Front view showing both candles upright on the wooden platform, with wax drips and purple flames clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the taller candle and the pooling melted wax at the base, with the pedestal's decorative rings in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the candles, more melted wax, and the full circular shape of the platform and base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the shorter candle and the wax drips, with the pedestal's base and column visible.
attribute_holder_type: ornate metal pedestal with wooden platform
